text:
Other: IV - Antibiotics (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received antibiotic IV medications in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
999 ANTCGLNT_ADMSN_CD ANTCGLNT_ADMSN_CD O0110H4A Other: IV - Anticoagulation (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received anticoagulant IV medications days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective
